recipe.title: Buffalo Chicken Cottage Cheese Bowl
recipe.summary: A fast, spicy, high-protein bowl with chicken, cottage cheese, buffalo sauce, and crunchy veggies.
instructions: Add cottage cheese to a bowl and spread it as the base.
Top with shredded chicken and buffalo sauce.
Add cucumber, celery, carrots, and light ranch.
Sprinkle with blue cheese if using.
Mix before eating or enjoy layered.
tips: Use rotisserie chicken to make this even faster.
Add extra celery for more crunch without many calories.
Use Greek yogurt ranch if you want even more protein.

seo.meta_title: Buffalo Chicken Cottage Cheese Bowl | 42g Protein, 400 Calories
seo.meta_description: Make this buffalo chicken cottage cheese bowl with 42g protein, around 400 calories, and simple ingredients in under 10 minutes.

images.alt_text: Buffalo chicken cottage cheese bowl with celery, cucumber, carrots, and buffalo sauce.

pinterest.title: Buffalo Chicken Cottage Cheese Bowl | 42g Protein | Ready in 8 Minutes
pinterest.description: This buffalo chicken cottage cheese bowl is spicy, crunchy, creamy, and packed with over 40 grams of protein.
